song.title: Create in Me a Clean Heart
song.author: Andy Gilbert / Psalm 51:10-12
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G D C G Create in me a clean heart, O God, . D G And renew a right spirit within me.
(repeat)
[C] .C D G D/F# Em Cast me not away from Thy presence, O Lord. . C D G G7 And take not Thy Holy Spirit from me. . C D G Bm Em Restore unto me the joy of Thy salvation, .C D G And renew a right spirit within me.
